notes: Lots of people can't tell difference between SKSE and SKSE64, SKSE may work but SKSE64 does not because getskseversion does not work in console (simple test). SKSE64 needs a special patch which from what I can tell isn't applied to proton. Possibly because its not mainlined yet... this problem has existed since 64 bit script extenders existed.
title: Skyrim Script Extender (SKSE)

notes: Works perfectly but you need to create a copy of the skse_loader.exe and rename it SkyrimLauncher.exe. But make sure you have BOTH in the steamapps\common\Skyrim folder as it may not run properly and some mods you install may not work without detecting them in tandem.
title: Skyrim Script Extender (SKSE)
